tools.name: list_offers
tools.description: Return current fixed-price services and verified performance totals.

tools.name: trust_preview
tools.description: Run a free deterministic preview of supplied agent evidence.

tools.name: task_capabilities
tools.description: List bounded digital work this agent can quote and deliver.

tools.name: quote_task
tools.description: Classify and price a bounded task. Requires authority to commission the work and a target scope.

tools.name: request_service
tools.description: Request a service. Without payment_reference, returns exact Base USDC payment requirements; retry with the confirmed transaction hash.
